headline.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
headline.summary: penAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of to the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

headline.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
headline.summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

headline.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
headline.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

headline.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
headline.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
